name: JennAIGentOrchestrator
description: Jenn external renamed parallel candidate for AIGentOrchestrator. Execution remains disabled by governance policy until a future separately authorized gate.
author: VCPToolBox Team

AIGENT_ORCHESTRATOR_ALLOW_EXECUTION.description: Reserved safety gate for future real downstream execution. Stage 5 keeps this false.

invocationCommands.description: Build a dry-run Prompt -> Workflow -> Quality pipeline plan. Optional StyleTrainer prep step can be included without training.
Build a dry-run retry workflow plan from a QualityInspector retry_queue. No regeneration is executed.
Report orchestration safety gate state and known agent roles.
